title: QIAseq FastSelect 5s, 16s, 23s Fragmentation
author: Opentrons
description: This is Part 2 to the QIAseq FastSelect 5s, 16s, 23s Protocol. This protocol is used to perform the addition of samples with mastermix into a plate. Part 1 to this protocol is the normalization of samples. Part 3 to this protocol is the Extraction and Clean-Up steps. Links: * [Part 1: Sample Normalization](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/0b97ae) * [Part 2: QIAseq FastSelect 5s, 16s, 23s Fragmentation](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/0b97ae-protocol-2B) * [Part 3: QIAseq FastSelect 5s, 16s, 23s Extraction](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/0b97ae-protocol-3B)
steps_raw: This is Part 2 to the QIAseq FastSelect 5s, 16s, 23s Protocol. This protocol is used to perform the addition of samples with mastermix into a plate. Part 1 to this protocol is the normalization of samples. Part 3 to this protocol is the Extraction and Clean-Up steps. Links: * [Part 1: Sample Normalization](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/0b97ae) * [Part 2: QIAseq FastSelect 5s, 16s, 23s Fragmentation](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/0b97ae-protocol-2B) * [Part 3: QIAseq FastSelect 5s, 16s, 23s Extraction](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/0b97ae-protocol-3B)
The diluted RNA plate will be placed on the temperature module placed on site 7.
The Mastermix Plate will be placed on temperature module placed on site 10. The volume for the MasterMix will be adjust in the protocol, depending on the RNA Volume put into the drop down.
After this protocol is finished the plate should be removed and placed on a thermocycler according to FastSelect 5s/16s/23s, Table 3.
materials_raw: Applied Biosystems Enduraplate 96 Aluminum Block 220 µL
Opentrons 96 Well Aluminum Block with Bio-Rad Well Plate 200 µL
